KINETICHEAP++ FINAL RESULTS — WSL Benchmark
Hardware: Intel Core i5-10210U, 8GB RAM, WSL2 Kali Linux, GCC 15.2 -O3

=== KEY RESULTS ===
KH++ speedup over B2: 1.29x-1.76x (mean 1.47x)
KH++ certificate reduction vs B2: ~8.8x fewer
KH++ certificate reduction vs B10: ~5.8x fewer
Certificate scaling alpha: 1.0007 R2=1.0000
